name: How do I show my PTSD from workplace accident is compensable in Utah?

mainEntity.name: How do I show my PTSD from workplace accident is compensable in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical proof it exceeds normal stress, job-related.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Prove exceeds everyday stress with objective medical evidence; AOE/COE applies.[1] Key factors: (1) Severe violence/accident; (2) Doctor diagnosis; (3) Not idiopathic.[1][2] Get psych eval, file claim; appeal denials.[8] Mental claims scrutinized.

description: Medical proof it exceeds normal stress, job-related.[1]
